Got P0700 on my car. Is this an expensive repair?

P0700: Transmission Control System Malfunction — the TCM has detected a fault and stored additional transmission codes. Typical repair cost: Varies widely by underlying cause; transmission fluid service: $100–$250. Recommended first step: Scan for additional P07xx or P08xx codes stored alongside P0700 — those reveal the actual fault.
